Article.ArticleTitle: Comparison of the effects of inspiratory muscle strength training and aerobic exercise training on vascular function in patients with hypertension.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Sport Science, University of Seoul, Seoul, Republic of Korea.
Department of Sport Science, University of Seoul, Seoul, Republic of Korea.
Department of Sport Science, University of Seoul, Seoul, Republic of Korea.
Department of Sport Science, University of Seoul, Seoul, Republic of Korea.
Department of Biobehavioral Sciences, Teachers College, Columbia University, New York, NY, USA.
Department of Sport Science, University of Seoul, Seoul, Republic of Korea. syjae@uos.ac.kr.
Institute of Health and Exercise for Urban Older Adults, Department of Sport Science, University of Seoul, Seoul, Republic of Korea. syjae@uos.ac.kr.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Conflict of interest: All authors declare no conflicts of interest. Ethical approval: The experimental procedures were explained in detail to all participants and all provided written informed consent before any data collection. The study was developed in accordance with the Declaration of Helsinki and all procedures were approved by the Institutional Review Board of University of Seoul (UOS 2023-02-003-001).
